title: React hooks deep dive
content: Been diving into custom hooks lately. They're a game changer for component logic reuse.

title: CSS Grid vs Flexbox
content: For complex layouts, Grid is king. But Flexbox is still the best for 1D layouts.

title: MongoDB aggregation pipelines
content: Learning to think in stages with aggregation. It's powerful once you get the hang of it.

title: Debugging frontend state
content: Redux DevTools is a lifesaver. Can't imagine managing complex state without it.

title: Planning my next project
content: Thinking about building a full-stack app with authentication. Should be fun.

title: Designing with constraints
content: Working with limited colors forces you to be more intentional with design choices.

title: Typography matters
content: Spent hours tweaking font sizes and line heights. Small details that make a big difference.

title: Dark mode implementation
content: Dark mode isn't just a trend—it's essential accessibility. Using CSS custom properties.

title: User testing insights
content: Tested the new interface with real users today. Got some valuable feedback.

title: Prototyping in Figma
content: Figma's interactive components are game-changing for design systems.

title: JavaScript performance tips
content: Debouncing and throttling can dramatically improve app responsiveness.

title: Testing strategies
content: Unit tests are good, but integration tests catch the real issues.

title: API design best practices
content: RESTful APIs are clean, but GraphQL gives you more flexibility.

title: Working with async/await
content: Promises are powerful, but async/await makes the code so much cleaner.

title: Learning new frameworks
content: Switching between frameworks teaches you what's fundamental to web dev.

title: Video editing workflow
content: Switched to DaVinci Resolve. The color grading tools are incredible.

title: Content strategy for short form
content: TikTok changed how we think about video. Hook in the first frame.

title: Audio quality matters
content: Bad audio ruins good video. Invested in a decent microphone finally.

title: Growing an audience
content: Consistency matters more than perfection. Post regularly, improve over time.

title: Storytelling through media
content: Every frame should serve the story. Cut ruthlessly.
